title: Launch export bundle preserves a credential-shaped preview in shared evidence
impact_summary: Credential-like values often survive in support exports, screenshots, or copied environment previews long after teams think they are safe to share.
why_this_matters: Shared evidence packs and onboarding notes are common places for secret-shaped data to linger.
evidence_fixture: redacted environment snapshot with fake support forwarding token preview
suggested_patch_summary: Allowlist safe environment previews and strip credential-like material from exports.
replay_regression_note: Compare .env.example to the evidence snapshot and confirm no live credential is referenced.
